stemHtml: What is a common characteristic of GPS, GLONASS and GALILEO?

options.a: For position fixing they are all based on the WGS 84 ellipsoid.
options.b: They all reach their highest degree of accuracy in polar areas.
options.c: They are all using the same frequencies to permit a single receiver to work all three systems.
options.d: All three systems use time measurement to determine a position.
